Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: A client inquiry submitted via the contact form.

name.description: The name of the person inquiring.

email.description: The email address of the person inquiring.

phone.description: The phone number of the person inquiring.

service.description: The service they are interested in.

message.description: The message or question from the client.

status.description: The current status of the inquiry.
